sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39650" key="e)pikatoike/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικατ-οικέω</orth>, <sense id="n39650.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">live at, inhabit</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1247.tlg001:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ceb.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
